CONTENT.Career: Although Maietta was once included in the Serie A rosters of Juventus and Perugia in the early 2000s, he did not make his Serie A debut until 2013, after being promoted with Hellas Verona. He made his Serie B debut with Triestina during the 2002–03 season.Maietta missed 3 weeks in 2016–17 season.On 1 September 2020 Empoli announced his retirement from playing and that he joined the club staff.
CONTENT.External links: Domenico Maietta at WorldFootball.netHellas Verona F.C. Official Player Profile (in Italian)

SUMMARY: Domenico Maietta (born 3 August 1982) is an Italian former professional footballer who played as a defender.
